description: A small-scale townscape showing a stone arch bridge spanning a canal or waterway. Figures stand on and near the bridge. To the right, buildings with chimneys and rooftops crowd together, with an arched gateway visible. At left, a tall pole or mast rises near the bridge. The palette is muted with warm browns, greys, and soft sky tones. Small figures populate the scene. The composition is characteristic of an 18th-century Venetian veduta or capriccio.
